title: MarriageLicenseApplication
description: An application for a NYC marriage license submitted to the Office of the City Clerk's Marriage Bureau — the single highest-value citizen transaction of this domain. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for marriage-license applications; today a couple can only apply through Project Cupid (projectcupid.cityofnewyork.us), a no-code application built on the rented Unqork platform. This schema is the write surface (apply) and its own read surface (check application status); an approved application yields a marriage-license.json.

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application id (Project Cupid record id). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Application lifecycle status. Set by the Marriage Bureau / Project Cupid, not the applicant.

priorMarriagesA.description: Number of prior marriages for applicant A (affects documentation required).

priorMarriagesB.description: Number of prior marriages for applicant B.

newNameA.description: Optional new surname applicant A elects to take.

newNameB.description: Optional new surname applicant B elects to take.

appointmentType.description: Whether the license appointment is in person or via video (Project Cupid supports both for marriage licenses).

requestedAppointmentId.description: The appointment slot the couple wants to book for their license appointment (see appointment on ceremony.json).

waiverRequested.description: Request a judicial waiver of the 24-hour waiting period.

attestation.description: Applicants attest that the information provided is true and both parties consent to the marriage.

licenseId.description: The marriage license id issued once this application is approved.
